Text type T5: bounded real domain
A single dense real but self-contained engineered system introduced from real documents. Deferred.
Introduce one bounded real domain, the Apollo Lunar Module electrical system, from actual technical documents rather than generated facts, as a signal-injection test.

T5 deliberately injects one dense, self-contained engineered system whose referents are internal (buses, circuit breakers, load shedding, low-power operation). It must come from real source documents so the facts are consistent rather than hallucinated. It is a longer-term experiment about introducing a whole domain smoothly, and is deferred.
